chapter_title: About Seeking Forgiveness and Its Virtue

hadith_entries.text:
1095. Narrated Abu-Huraira 'I heard Allah's
Messenger saying: "By Allah! I seek Allah's Forgiveness.
and turn to Him in repentance for more than seventy times a
day." (Bukhari).
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)

1096. Narrated Thawban ; 'Whenever Allah's Messenger
finished his prayer, he used to say after asking Allah's
forgiveness three times: "Allahomma Antas-Salamo Waminkas-
Salamo Tabarakt Yathal Jalali Walikram (O Allah, You are ther
Giver of peace, and peace emits from You. Blessed are You, O
Possessor of glory and honor." (Muslim).
